title: Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Monitor''''' was an Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that lead an attempted repair operation when [[Garreth Holtz]]'s flagship, [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']], was damaged.

==History==
The ''Monitor'' provided escort for a [[Corrupter repair convoy|convoy]] of freighters, which were en route to the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]] to rendezvous with the ''Corrupter''. However, the ''Monitor''{{'s}} presence proved to be insufficient when a Rebel strike force intercepted and destroyed most of the convoy at a transit point outside the system. ''Monitor'' herself and several surviving ships made it to the Mev system where she attempted to transfer a team of hyperdrive technicians to the ''Corrupter''. Once again, the ''Monitor'' was unable to stop the Rebels as they finished off the convoy and proceeded to destroy the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] carrying the technicians. She was destroyed in this [[Battle of Bettel|battle]] by Ace Azzameen.

The complete loss of the convoy and the technicians crippled the already damaged ''Corrupter'' and prevented her from stopping the [[Defiance Task Force]] from escaping the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]].

==Behind the scenes==
It is possible for the player to destroy the ''Monitor'' in the [[Battle of Bettel]]. Since the ship doesn't appear anywhere else in the game and no other source, it is likely that it was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
